Hero.promiseText: For stores, cafés, restaurants and other B2B customers across the city.

Value.label: Why this platform exists
Value.title: Logistics without building your own fleet and operations team.
Value.text: Producers focus on products. Bananay coordinates distribution through a connected regional network.
items: No need to keep your own drivers and trucks
One connected delivery chain from producer to point of sale
Built for food distribution, not generic parcel shipping
Transparent stages for every participant in the network

ForWhom.label: Who is Bananay for?
ForWhom.title: Direct contracts between regional producers and logistics partners.
ForWhom.text: Bananay is an automated platform that connects regional food producers with logistics service providers through direct contracts with regional distribution and distributed logistics functionality.
ForWhom.text2: We deliver goods from 1 unit to your customers within the city at a fixed price and without address limits within 18 hours.
ForWhom.text3: For shops, HoReCa and other business clients.
ForWhom.cta: Your delivery city and price for your business
ForWhom.heroTitle: Bananay for producers, drivers, hubs, and couriers
ForWhom.heroText: One network where each role handles its delivery stage - from producer request to last mile.
ForWhom.participantsTitle: Four roles in one delivery chain
ForWhom.participantsText: Each network participant handles a specific route stage - from producer request to last mile.
ForWhom.role1Kicker: Main participant at the first stage
ForWhom.role1Text: Creates a delivery request and starts the entire chain. Bananay helps deliver products to shops, cafes, and restaurants without a private fleet or complex manual coordination.
ForWhom.role1Action: Creates requests and starts the delivery chain.
ForWhom.role1Gets: Fixed delivery pricing and operations without running in-house logistics.
ForWhom.role2Text: Deliver goods from the producer to the distribution center and operate as part of a single logistics chain.
ForWhom.role2Fits: Best for: independent and corporate carriers.
ForWhom.role3Text: Receive, sort, and pass goods further along the route. Anyone with a suitable facility can become a network participant.
ForWhom.role3Action: Receive, sort, and transfer goods to the next route stage.
ForWhom.role3Fits: Best for: operators with suitable distribution space.
ForWhom.role3Gets: A steady flow of intake, sorting, and transfer tasks.
ForWhom.role4Text: Deliver goods from the hub to a store, cafe, restaurant, or other point of sale at the final stage of the route.
ForWhom.role4Action: Deliver goods to stores, cafes, and restaurants at the final stage.
ForWhom.role4Fits: Best for: couriers and last-mile teams.
ForWhom.role4Gets: Regular delivery assignments to points of sale.
ForWhom.nextStepTitle: Choose your role in the Bananay network
ForWhom.nextStepText: For producers - calculate delivery. For partners - discuss joining the platform.

Benefits.label: Why choose Bananay?
Benefits.title: A fixed price per unit is the platform's main advantage.
Benefits.heroTitle: A fixed price per unit is the platform's main advantage
Benefits.heroText: Producers know delivery cost to each destination in advance, without manual coordination or unpredictable pricing logic.
Benefits.allBenefitsTitle: Why fixed pricing works in real daily logistics
Benefits.allBenefitsText: The model is built on predictable calculation, one shared platform, and a stable operating rhythm. Below are core and supporting benefits.
Benefits.producerSectionTitle: Clear costs help you make decisions faster
Benefits.producerSectionText: When unit cost is known in advance, it is easier to plan shipments, calculate margin, and make growth decisions.

producerPoints.noOwnFleet: No in-house fleet and fewer fixed overhead costs
producerPoints.easierEconomics: Shipment economics are clear before dispatch
producerPoints.lessManualOps: Less manual coordination and routine operations work
producerPoints.easierScaling: Faster scaling across stores and delivery points

fromOneUnit.title: From 1 unit of product
fromOneUnit.text: Shipments can start from low volume without waiting for large batches.

fixedPrice.title: Fixed price per unit
fixedPrice.text: Delivery cost per product unit is clear in advance for each destination.

transparentCalculation.title: Clear calculation before dispatch
transparentCalculation.text: Price is calculated upfront without manual approvals for every shipment.

singlePlatform.title: One platform instead of manual coordination
singlePlatform.text: The request is created once, and routing is assembled inside one network.

dailyFoodLogistics.title: Built for regular food logistics
dailyFoodLogistics.text: The platform is designed for daily recurring distribution, not one-off trips.

strictSchedule.title: Structured delivery schedule
strictSchedule.text: Operations run on a clear rhythm instead of ad hoc agreements.

addressSorting.title: Sorting by delivery addresses
addressSorting.text: Goods are prepared in advance for exact stores and destination points.

electronicDocs.title: Electronic documents
electronicDocs.text: Document flow is integrated into operations and reduces manual handling.

Benefits.finalCtaTitle: Check delivery cost for your products
Benefits.finalCtaText: You now understand how the model works. The next step is to calculate cost and estimate your shipment economics.

HowItWorks.label: How it works
HowItWorks.title: From producer request to delivery at the point of sale
HowItWorks.heroText: The producer creates a request and sees pricing right away. Then Bananay coordinates the product flow across the network to a store, cafe, or restaurant.
HowItWorks.transitionText: A short in-product scenario: from creating one request to monitoring delivery statuses by stage.
HowItWorks.logicTitle: One request - then the platform runs delivery
HowItWorks.logicText: You set product, volume, and delivery points. Bananay calculates cost, connects the required network participants, and moves goods to the point of sale through a clear route.
HowItWorks.participantsText: Each role owns its stage, but for the producer it is one managed delivery chain.

producer.title: Producer
producer.text: Creates the request and starts delivery.

hubs.title: Distribution hubs
hubs.text: Receive, sort, and pass goods forward.

couriers.title: Couriers
couriers.text: Deliver goods to stores, cafes, or restaurants.

HowItWorks.processTitle: How it looks step by step

step1.title: The producer creates a request
step1.text: Specifies goods, volume, and delivery points. This is where the full chain starts.

step2.title: The platform shows cost immediately
step2.text: The producer sees a clear per-unit / SKU calculation in advance and can estimate shipment economics before route launch.

step3.title: Bananay builds the route through the network
step3.text: Then the platform coordinates movement through drivers, hubs, and last mile - without manual chain assembly for each shipment.

step4.title: Goods reach the point of sale with transparent status
step4.text: The order passes all required stages to a store, cafe, or restaurant, and participants can see their stage and movement status.

HowItWorks.benefitsTitle: Easier shipment planning and less operations overhead
HowItWorks.benefitsText: When pricing and delivery logic are clear in advance, it is easier to model economics, launch shipments, and avoid manual coordination.

benefits.item4: One system instead of fragmented contractors
benefits.item5: Delivery to stores, cafes, and restaurants

HowItWorks.nextStepText: For producers - delivery cost calculation. For network partners - onboarding to the platform.

producer.title: Producer
producer.text: Creates a shipment request and starts the delivery chain.

truck.title: Carrier
truck.text: Moves larger cargo batches from producers to local hubs.

hub.title: Hub
hub.text: Receives, scans, sorts and prepares goods for the next route.

courier.title: Courier
courier.text: Delivers smaller batches to stores, cafés and restaurants.

tracking.title: Tracking
tracking.text: Lets delivery points see the current stage of every order.

Apps.label: Apps and entry points
Apps.title: Five apps, all connected to one logistics service.
Apps.text: We keep the app-based structure, but make the producer entry point more commercial by linking it with delivery pricing.

producer.label: For producers & importers
producer.title: Producer App
producer.text: Create shipments, estimate delivery price for your city, and stop worrying about building your own delivery operations.

truck.label: For long-haul movement
truck.title: Truck Driver App
truck.text: Move goods from producers to hubs across the launch region.

hub.label: For local facilities
hub.title: Distribution Hub App
hub.text: Receive, sort and prepare shipments for the next stage in the chain.

courier.label: For last-mile delivery
courier.title: Courier App
courier.text: Deliver smaller batches to stores, cafés and restaurants.

tracking.label: For delivery points
tracking.title: Tracking App
tracking.text: Monitor order status and see what stage the delivery is in right now.
